title: valeriana coreana subsp. sachalinensis
intro: Valeriana coreana subsp. sachalinensis, also known as the Amur valerian or Sakhalin valerian, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the valerian family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anxiolytic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of valerenic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Valeriana coreana subsp. sachalinensis include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia and restlessness. Valeriana coreana subsp. sachalinensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
